emma_holiday_pdf.label: Emma Holiday PDF
emma_holiday_pdf.notes: Registered against the existing NBME PDF toolchain. The registry does not modify the extraction, normalization, or app-ready schema.

fast_facts_pptx.label: Fast Facts PPTX
fast_facts_pptx.notes: Uses the existing FAST_FACTS_PROFILE in the lecture-slide generator.

amboss_pdf.label: AMBOSS PDF
amboss_pdf.notes: Uses the existing AMBOSS_PROFILE deterministic extraction path.

uworld_notes.notes: Existing external notes pipeline exists, but it is not part of the initial Batch Import Center registry.

anki_notes.notes: Existing wrapper pipeline exists, but it is not part of the initial Batch Import Center registry.

ome_pdf.notes: External OME generator exists separately. It is intentionally not registered in the initial source set.

divine_transcript.notes: Current Divine workflow remains in-app and is not registered as a local Python pipeline here.
